0101110110111100 0101111100010001 0 -> sum: 1011110011001101, cout: 0
0101100011011010 0110111001101001 0 -> sum: 1100011101000011, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
